action.reasoning: Observation: eval failed due to torch.load weights_only=True. Training accuracy ~0.01 (worse than chance 0.016), loss exploding from 4.2 to 300+, indicating learning rate too high / features not normalized. Analysis: linear head on frozen CLIP features diverges; 1e-3 lr likely too high for high-dimensional features. Decision: fix predict.py with weights_only=False, add LayerNorm before classifier, lower lr to 1e-4, add gradient clipping 1.0, reorder DataParallel wrapping. Retrain 5 epochs, submit eval for new baseline.
